allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: replace AST parser with vite.ssrLoadModule for preview files

Delete preview-parser.ts entirely — preview modules are now loaded at
runtime via vite.ssrLoadModule\(\) instead of parsed with oxc AST.
Scanner simplified to glob + ssrLoadModule. Dev server creates Vite
before scanning so ssrLoadModule is available during registry build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
